description: Baseline: TSC variant on c5.4xlarge (16 vCPU, 32GB), 133 tests
Experiment 1: Cache pulumi-test-language binary build across variants + OTel tracing instrumentation
Experiment 3: Increased parallelism to -parallel=16 (no improvement over default)
Experiment 4: npm_config_prefer_offline=true - instance became unresponsive, likely caused issues with local tarball installs
Experiment 5: node_modules + tsc output caching via hardlinks (SLOWER - cache overhead > savings)
Experiment 6: tmpfs (RAM disk) for test temp directories - 44.8% improvement
Experiment 7: tmpfs + parallel=32 (SLOWER - too much parallelism on tmpfs causes OOM/swapping)
Experiment 8: All 3 variants (TSC+TSNode+Bun) in parallel with tmpfs — 607s total vs 578s for TSC alone baseline
Experiment 9: Skip local=true early + npm --no-audit --no-fund — 268s (53.6% improvement from baseline)
Experiment 10: All 3 variants with skip local early + npm --no-audit --no-fund + tmpfs — 551s total
Experiment 11: Skip installDependencies for subsequent shared-source runs — 227s (60.8% from baseline)
Experiment 12: All 3 variants with all optimizations — 531s total (64% improvement from estimated sequential baseline)
Experiment 13: Policy pack install caching — 263s (possible noise, marginal change)
Experiment 15: All 3 variants with all optimizations including --skipLibCheck — 520s total
